title: Sai Ekvira Graphics Business Website - Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Apply CMYK-inspired visual theme with deep navy blue, vibrant orange, and CMYK accent colors throughout the website with bold modern typography and mobile-responsive design
acceptanceCriteria: Deep blue, orange, and CMYK accent colors are consistently used across all sections
White background ensures readability throughout
Bold sans-serif headings are used consistently
All sections are fully mobile-responsive

file_operations.description: Extend Tailwind theme with custom colors: primary (deep navy #0A1F5C), secondary (vibrant orange #FF6B00), accent colors (cyan #00AEEF, magenta #EC008C, yellow #FFD700), and white background. Add custom font family for bold sans-serif headings.

Set global base styles with white background, apply custom font families for headings (bold sans-serif), ensure mobile-responsive base typography, and establish consistent color usage patterns across the application.

requirements.summary: Build full-width Hero section with printing-themed background image, business name, tagline, and three CTA buttons (Call Now, WhatsApp Us, Get Quote)
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section spans full viewport width
Background image is printing-themed with a semi-transparent dark overlay for text legibility
Business name and tagline are prominently displayed
Call Now button triggers tel:09702477181
WhatsApp Us button links to https://wa.me/919702477181
Get Quote button smoothly scrolls to the Contact section

file_operations.description: Create Hero component with full-width layout, using the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1920x900.jpg as background with dark overlay. Display 'Sai Ekvira Graphics' as large headline, tagline 'Quality Printing Solutions in Kalyan – Fast, Affordable & Reliable', and three CTA buttons: Call Now (tel:09702477181), WhatsApp Us (https://wa.me/919702477181), and Get Quote (smooth scroll to contact section).

requirements.summary: Build About Us section with business description, operating hours, and full address
acceptanceCriteria: About Us section is clearly visible with heading and body text
Operating hours (Mon–Sat 10 AM–9 PM, Sunday Closed) are displayed
Full business address is shown

file_operations.description: Create About component with heading 'About Us', body text describing commercial printing services, operating hours (Monday–Saturday 10 AM – 9 PM, Sunday Closed), and full address (Shop No 09, Namrata Heights CHS, Adharwadi, Kalyan West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 421301). Include the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/about-printer-machine.dim_900x600.jpg to showcase modern printing equipment.

requirements.summary: Build Our Services section with 8 service cards in responsive grid with icons, names, descriptions, and hover effects
acceptanceCriteria: 8 service cards are displayed in a responsive grid (4 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile)
Each card has an icon, service name, and short description
Hover effect uses theme accent colors

file_operations.description: Create Services component displaying 8 service cards in a responsive grid (4 columns desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile): Flex Banner Printing, Digital Printing, Visiting Cards, Brochures & Pamphlets, Poster Printing, Signage & Shop Boards, Vehicle Graphics & Branding, Photo Prints & Wedding Cards. Each card has an icon, service name, and short description with hover effect using CMYK accent colors.

requirements.summary: Build Gallery/Portfolio section with 8-12 sample product images in masonry grid with lightbox functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery section contains at least 8 sample printed product images
Images are arranged in a masonry or responsive grid
Clicking an image opens it in a lightbox/modal

file_operations.description: Create Gallery component displaying sample printed products in masonry/responsive grid layout. Use the generated images: frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-flex-banner.dim_800x600.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-visiting-cards.dim_800x600.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-wedding-card.dim_800x600.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-brochure.dim_800x600.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-hoarding.dim_800x600.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-vehicle-branding.dim_800x600.jpg, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-signage.dim_800x600.jpg, and frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-posters.dim_800x600.jpg. Implement lightbox/modal functionality to view images in full size on click.

requirements.summary: Build Why Choose Us section with 6 feature points displayed as icon-accompanied cards
acceptanceCriteria: Section heading 'Why Choose Sai Ekvira Graphics?' is displayed
All 6 feature points are shown with icons or styled indicators
Section is visually distinct from adjacent sections

file_operations.description: Create WhyChooseUs component with heading 'Why Choose Sai Ekvira Graphics?' displaying 6 feature cards with icons: High-Quality Prints, Latest Printing Machines, Quick Turnaround & Delivery, Competitive & Affordable Prices, 100% Customer Satisfaction, Trusted Local Shop in Kalyan West. Use accent colors for icons and styling to make section visually distinct.

requirements.summary: Build Contact section with form (Name, Phone, Service Type dropdown, Message), business contact info, Google Maps embed, and floating WhatsApp button
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form has Name, Phone, Service Type (dropdown), and Message fields with a Submit button
Submitting the form shows a success message
Phone number is a clickable tel: link
Google Maps iframe is embedded showing the Adharwadi, Kalyan West area
Floating WhatsApp button is fixed bottom-right and links to https://wa.me/919702477181
WhatsApp button is visible on all pages/scroll positions

file_operations.description: Create Contact component with React-managed form (Name, Phone Number, Service Type dropdown with 8 services, Message fields) showing success message on submit. Display business contact info with phone 097024 77181 as clickable tel: link and full address (Shop No 09, Namrata Heights CHS, Adharwadi, Kalyan West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 421301). Embed Google Maps iframe pointing to Adharwadi, Kalyan West, Mumbai area.

Create FloatingWhatsApp component as a fixed button positioned bottom-right, linking to https://wa.me/919702477181 with WhatsApp icon. Ensure button remains visible across all scroll positions and uses accent color scheme for visibility.

requirements.summary: Build Footer section with business name, address, phone, social media icons, and copyright text
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays business name, address, and clickable phone number
Instagram and Facebook icon links are present
Copyright line is displayed

file_operations.description: Create Footer component displaying business name 'Sai Ekvira Graphics', full address (Shop No 09, Namrata Heights CHS, Adharwadi, Kalyan West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 421301), phone number 097024 77181 as clickable tel: link, placeholder social media icons for Instagram and Facebook, and copyright text '© 2024 Sai Ekvira Graphics. All Rights Reserved.'

requirements.summary: Add sticky top navigation bar with logo and smooth-scroll anchor links, collapsing to hamburger menu on mobile, with transparent-to-solid background transition on scroll
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is sticky/fixed at the top
Navigation links scroll smoothly to each section
Navbar transitions from transparent to solid navy on scroll
On mobile, links collapse into a hamburger menu

file_operations.description: Create Navbar component as sticky/fixed top bar with business name/logo on left and smooth-scroll anchor links on right (About, Services, Gallery, Why Us, Contact). Implement scroll listener to transition background from transparent over hero to solid navy blue when scrolled. On mobile, collapse navigation links into hamburger menu.

requirements.summary: Implement English/Hindi language toggle button in navbar switching section headings, navigation labels, and button text between English and Hindi
acceptanceCriteria: A toggle button in the navbar switches between English and Hindi
Section headings, navigation labels, and key button labels change language on toggle
The toggle state persists while the user is on the page

file_operations.description: Create useLanguage hook managing language state (English/Hindi) with React useState. Provide translation object mapping for section headings (About Us → हमारे बारे में, Our Services → हमारी सेवाएं, Contact Us → संपर्क करें, Why Choose Us → हमें क्यों चुनें, Gallery → गैलरी), navigation labels, and key button labels. Language state persists during user session.
Add language toggle button to Navbar using useLanguage hook. Button switches between English and Hindi, updating all navigation link labels accordingly.
Integrate useLanguage hook to support Hindi translations for button labels (Call Now, WhatsApp Us, Get Quote) in Hero component.
Integrate useLanguage hook to support Hindi translation for 'About Us' heading in About component.
Integrate useLanguage hook to support Hindi translation for 'Our Services' heading in Services component.
Integrate useLanguage hook to support Hindi translation for 'Gallery' heading in Gallery component.
Integrate useLanguage hook to support Hindi translation for 'Why Choose Us' heading in WhyChooseUs component.
Integrate useLanguage hook to support Hindi translations for 'Contact Us' heading and form button labels in Contact component.

Wire all created components into App.tsx: import and render Navbar at top, followed by Hero, About, Services, Gallery, WhyChooseUs, Contact, and Footer sections in order. Also render FloatingWhatsApp component. Ensure smooth scrolling behavior is enabled for anchor navigation.
